entry.title: Python - find number of identical pairs in an array

link.title: Python - find number of identical pairs in an array

entry.summary: Let’s see how to find number of pairs of elements of the array that are equal but that occuppy different positions in the array. That means, a pair of indices (P,Q) is called identical if 0 <= P < Q and array element A[P] = A[Q]. The goal is to calculate the number of identical pairs of indices. For example, consider array A such that: A[0] = 3 A[1] = 5 a[2] = 6 A[3] = 3 A[4] = 3 A[5] =...

entry.title: Python - make palindrome by replacing '?' in a string

link.title: Python - make palindrome by replacing '?' in a string

entry.summary: This is a program in Python which returns palindrome which can be obtained by replacing all of the question marks in the given string str with ‘Z’. If no palindrome can be obtained, the function will return the string “Not palindrome”. A palindrome is a string that reads the same both forwards and backwards. Some examples of palindromes are: “malayalam”, “radar”, “47874” Sample output: Gi...

entry.title: Upgrade Rancher version
entry.summary: When you upgrade your Kubernetes cluster version, the kubectl client in Rancher may not be compatible and you need to update Rancher to latest version in order to fix it. How to upgrade Rancher version If you have launched Rancher server without using an external DB The Rancher server database will be inside the currently running container. We will follow the below steps to upgrade the versio...

entry.title: Manually join a Windows instance to Active Directory

link.title: Manually join a Windows instance to Active Directory

entry.summary: Prerequisites Active directory service provided by AWS should be created Either the EC2 instance launched in same VPC of Active directory or there is VPC peering Active directory user login should be created To join a Windows instance to AWS Managed Microsoft AD directory: Connect to the instance using any Remote Desktop Protocol client. Open the TCP/IPv4 properties ...

entry.title: AWS CloudwatchAgent Setup Linux with Autoscaling

link.title: AWS CloudwatchAgent Setup Linux with Autoscaling

entry.summary: In order to monitor memory and disk usage, you need to install Cloudwatch agent in the EC2 instance. Create IAM role > CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy > and attach it to the instance Add CloudWatchAgentAdminPolicy and AmazonEC2RoleforSSM Ubuntu Execute the folowing commands cd /usr/local/src/ wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/amazoncloudwatch-agent/ubuntu/amd64/latest/amazon-cloudwatch-agent...
